description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a contoured, double-cutaway body finished in a glossy white color. The guitar features a bolt-on neck with a natural wood finish and a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard, equipped with metallic frets and white dot inlays. The front of the body displays three single-coil pickups, a white pickguard, a five-way selector switch, and multiple control knobs for volume and tone adjustment. The bridge is a classic tremolo style, and the headstock is angled with six inline tuning pegs, typical of Fender Stratocaster-style guitars. The back of the guitar shows a rear cavity cover and the neck plate, with the body contours clearly visible. This instrument is commonly seen in urban environments such as music venues, street performances, and garages.
description: A white, double-cutaway electric guitar with a natural wood neck, three pickups, and a classic Stratocaster-style design. Features include a white pickguard, control knobs, and six inline tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the guitar's slim white body, natural wood neck, and the back cavity cover.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the body, neck plate, and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the body contours, neck, and the front hardware slightly visible.
description_view_3: Front view showcasing the white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, control knobs, and the full fretboard.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, classic Stratocaster contour
